---
title: ""
description: "A system approach to alcohol policy evaluation: using microsimulation to model the effect of policy changes on alcohol use and related harm"
format: 
  html:
    css: styles.css
    toc: false
    html-math-method: katex
---

:::{.page-container}

::: {.title-block}
:::{.project-label}
FONDECYT Regular · R-1240138
:::

# A system approach to alcohol policy evaluation

:::{.subtitle}
Using microsimulation to model the effect of policy changes on alcohol use and related harm
:::

:::{.date-range}
26 February 2024 — 31 March 2028
:::

::: {.byline}

:::{.byline-author}
:::{.byline-role}
Principal Investigator
:::
:::{.byline-name}
Álvaro Castillo-Carniglia [ORCID](https://orcid.org/0000-0002-3016-890X){.orcid-icon}
:::
:::{.byline-affiliation}
Full Professor, Department of Public Health, Facultad de Medicina y Ciencia, Universidad San Sebastián, Chile.
:::
:::{.byline-links}
[✉ alvacasti@gmail.com](mailto:alvacasti@gmail.com) 
:::
:::

:::{.byline-author}
:::{.byline-role}
Co-Investigator
:::
:::{.byline-name}
Cristóbal Cuadrado Nahum [ORCID](https://orcid.org/0000-0002-0174-5958){.orcid-icon}
:::
:::{.byline-affiliation}
Associate Professor, Escuela de Salud Pública, Universidad de Chile.
:::
:::{.byline-links}
[✉ ccuadrado@uchile.cl](mailto:ccuadrado@uchile.cl)
:::
:::

:::{.byline-author}
:::{.byline-role}
Collaborator
:::
:::{.byline-name}
José Antonio Ruiz-Tagle Maturana [ORCID](https://orcid.org/0000-0002-4866-5701){.orcid-icon}
:::
:::{.byline-affiliation}
Teacher at Duoc UC Professional Institute Foundation, Santiago, Chile; Director of Postgraduate Program in Data Science for the Social Sciences, Universidad Diego Portales.
:::
:::{.byline-links}
[ORCID](https://orcid.org/0000-0002-4866-5701)
:::
:::

:::{.byline-author}
:::{.byline-role}
Research Assistant
:::
:::{.byline-name}
Andrés González-Santa Cruz [ORCID](https://orcid.org/0000-0002-5166-9121){.orcid-icon}
:::
:::{.byline-affiliation}
Public Health PhD student, Universidad de Chile.
:::
:::{.byline-links}
[✉ gonzalez.santacruz.andres@gmail.com](mailto:gonzalez.santacruz.andres@gmail.com)
:::
:::

:::
:::

## Proposal

- [Proposal (PDF)](Proposal Fondecyt 1240138.pdf)

## Publications

:::{.publication-list}

:::{.publication-item}
:::{.pub-status .published}
Published
:::

:::{.pub-authors}
Ruiz-Tagle Maturana, J., Román Mella, F., & Castillo-Carniglia, Á.
:::

:::{.pub-title}
Sex and age differences in alcohol-attributable mortality in Chile between 2008 and 2022
:::

:::{.pub-journal}
Public Health in Practice, 11, 100798.
:::

:::{.pub-details}
2026. [https://doi.org/10.1016/j.puhip.2026.100798](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.puhip.2026.100798)
:::

:::{.pub-links}
[Journal](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.puhip.2026.100798) · [Repository](https://github.com/ACC1240138/Sex-and-age-differences-in-alcohol-attributable-mortality-in-Chile-between-2008-and-2022)
:::
:::

:::{.publication-item}
:::{.pub-status .submitted}
Submitted
:::

:::{.pub-authors}
Ruiz-Tagle Maturana, J., Purshouse, R. C., & Castillo-Carniglia, Á.
:::

:::{.pub-title}
Potentially avoidable injury mortality and years of potential life lost through reduction of heavy episodic drinking in Chile
:::

:::{.pub-journal}
Addiction.
:::

:::{.pub-details}
Manuscript submitted for publication. 2025.
:::

:::{.pub-links}
[Repository](https://github.com/ACC1240138/Potentially-Avoidable-Injury-Mortality-in-Chile-)
:::
:::

:::

## Work in Progress

:::{.project-card}
:::{.project-title}
Microsimulation modeling of alcohol policy in Chile
:::

:::{.project-description}
This repository contains the core analytical work of the FONDECYT project. It includes R scripts for data preparation, mortality trend analysis, and estimation of population-attributable fractions (PAF) and potential impact fractions (PIF) for alcohol-related harms in Chile. The work focuses on developing a microsimulation model to evaluate the effect of policy changes on alcohol use and related harm across different population subgroups.
:::

:::{.project-status}
In Development
:::

:::{.project-links}

- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/ACC1240138/)

:::
:::

:::{.footer-content}
FONDECYT Regular R-1240138 · Agencia Nacional de Investigación y Desarrollo (ANID), Chile

26 February 2024 – 31 March 2028
:::

:::
